questions.objective_ref: LO1: Define latency in the context of an API call and explain what controls it.
LO2: Calculate the approximate cost of a single API call given input and output token counts and per-token prices.
LO4: Compare the Haiku, Sonnet, and Opus model tiers on speed, cost, and capability, and select the appropriate tier for a given task.
LO5: Apply the three-question design checklist before writing an API call.
LO6: Write a cost-and-latency note suitable for a lab submission (Assessment A4).
LO3: Describe three dimensions of reliability — retries, error handling, and rate limits — and explain how they connect to topics already covered (12.13).

LO3: Describe three dimensions of reliability — retries, error handling, and rate limits — and explain how they connect to topics already covered (12.13). Reinforces corpus §10 on the three measurable properties of every API call.
